Bash(cd /d/projects-python/rag && PYTHONPATH=src python -c "
from rag.intent.rules import classify_rules
from rag.intent.benchmark import bench_rules
from rag.intent.training_data import generate
for q in ['订单中心和支付网关有什么区别','幂等键这个概念是什么意思','网关服务如何配置限流策略','最新版本的风控引擎']:
    r=classify_rules\(q\); print\(q,'->',r.intent, round\(r.confidence,2\),'time_sensitive=',r.time_sensitive\)
print\('bench:', bench_rules\(5000\)\)
s=generate\(500\)
from collections import Counter
print\('samples:', len\(s\), Counter\(x['label'] for x in s\)\)
")

Bash(cd /d/projects-python/rag && PYTHONPATH=src python -c "
from rag.retrieval.types import RetrievedChunk
from rag.retrieval.fusion import reciprocal_rank_fusion
dense=[RetrievedChunk\('c1','d1','a',0.9,'dense'\),RetrievedChunk\('c2','d2','b',0.8,'dense'\),RetrievedChunk\('c3','d3','c',0.7,'dense'\)]
sparse=[RetrievedChunk\('c2','d2','b',5.0,'sparse'\),RetrievedChunk\('c4','d4','e',4.0,'sparse'\),RetrievedChunk\('c1','d1','a',3.0,'sparse'\)]
fused=reciprocal_rank_fusion\([dense,sparse],top_k=3\)
for c in fused: print\(c.chunk_id, round\(c.score,5\), c.source\)
assert fused[0].chunk_id in \('c1','c2'\), 'top should be one appearing in both lists'
print\('RRF_OK'\)
")

Bash(cd /d/projects-python/rag && python -m py_compile src/rag/cache/*.py && echo "COMPILE_OK" && PYTHONPATH=src python -c "
from rag.cache.l1_cache import L1Cache
from rag.cache.types import CacheEntry
from rag.cache.metrics import HitRateMonitor
from rag.cache.similarity import cosine
# L1 semantic match + LRU eviction
l1=L1Cache\(capacity=3, threshold=0.92\)
l1.put\(CacheEntry\('k1','t1','q1','ans1',[1.0,0.0,0.0]\)\)
l1.put\(CacheEntry\('k2','t1','q2','ans2',[0.0,1.0,0.0]\)\)
hit=l1.get\('t1',[0.99,0.14,0.0]\)  # close to k1
print\('L1 hit:', hit.answer if hit else None, round\(hit.similarity,3\) if hit else None\)
print\('tenant isolation:', l1.get\('t2',[1.0,0.0,0.0]\)\)  # should be None
# LRU eviction
for k in ['k3','k4','k5']: l1.put\(CacheEntry\(k,'t1',k,k,[0.0,0.0,1.0]\)\)
print\('L1 size after overflow:', len\(l1\)\)
# metrics
m=HitRateMonitor\(window_seconds=3600, alert_threshold=0.4\)
for i in range\(60\): m.record\(hit=\(i%2==0\), now=1000.0+i\)
print\('hit_rate:', round\(m.hit_rate\(now=1060.0\),3\)\)
print\('cosine sanity:', round\(cosine\([1,0],[1,0]\),3\), round\(cosine\([1,0],[0,1]\),3\)\)
print\('CACHE_OK'\)
")

Bash(cd /d/projects-python/rag && PYTHONPATH=src python -c "
from rag.cache.l1_cache import L1Cache
from rag.cache.types import CacheEntry
from rag.cache.metrics import HitRateMonitor
from rag.cache.similarity import cosine
l1=L1Cache\(capacity=3, threshold=0.92\)
l1.put\(CacheEntry\('k1','t1','q1','ans1',[1.0,0.0,0.0]\)\)
l1.put\(CacheEntry\('k2','t1','q2','ans2',[0.0,1.0,0.0]\)\)
hit=l1.get\('t1',[0.99,0.14,0.0]\)
print\('L1 hit:', hit.answer if hit else None, round\(hit.similarity,3\) if hit else None\)
print\('tenant isolation:', l1.get\('t2',[1.0,0.0,0.0]\)\)
for k in ['k3','k4','k5']: l1.put\(CacheEntry\(k,'t1',k,k,[0.0,0.0,1.0]\)\)
print\('L1 size after overflow:', len\(l1\)\)
m=HitRateMonitor\(window_seconds=3600, alert_threshold=0.4\)
for i in range\(60\): m.record\(hit=\(i%2==0\), now=1000.0+i\)
print\('hit_rate:', round\(m.hit_rate\(now=1060.0\),3\)\)
print\('cosine sanity:', round\(cosine\([1,0],[1,0]\),3\), round\(cosine\([1,0],[0,1]\),3\)\)
print\('CACHE_OK'\)
")

Bash(cd /d/projects-python/rag && python -m py_compile src/rag/serving/*.py && echo "COMPILE_OK" && PYTHONPATH=src python -c "
from rag.serving.router import ConsistentHashRing, LoadBalancer
from rag.serving.model_pool import ModelPool, DEFAULT_POOL_CONFIGS
from rag.serving.types import Instance, InstanceState, PoolTier
from rag.serving.circuit_breaker import CircuitBreaker, BreakerState
from rag.serving.degradation import tier_for_intent, timeout_for, on_queue_timeout
from rag.serving.autoscaler import Autoscaler

# tiered routing table
print\('routing:', tier_for_intent\('Intent-1'\).value, tier_for_intent\('Intent-2'\).value, tier_for_intent\('Intent-3'\).value\)
print\('timeouts:', timeout_for\('Intent-1'\), timeout_for\('Intent-3'\)\)
print\('degrade I1:', on_queue_timeout\('Intent-1'\).kind, '| I3:', on_queue_timeout\('Intent-3'\).kind\)

# consistent-hash affinity stability
pool=ModelPool\(DEFAULT_POOL_CONFIGS[PoolTier.SMALL]\)
for i in range\(4\): pool.add\(Instance\(f's{i}',PoolTier.SMALL,f'http://s{i}',InstanceState.HEALTHY\)\)
lb=LoadBalancer\(\); lb.refresh\(pool\)
a=lb.pick\(pool,'tenantX'\).instance_id
b=lb.pick\(pool,'tenantX'\).instance_id
print\('affinity stable:', a==b, a\)

# overload -> fallback to least pending
pool.get\(a\).pending_tokens=99999
c=lb.pick\(pool,'tenantX'\).instance_id
print\('overload fallback differs:', c!=a, c\)

# circuit breaker
cb=CircuitBreaker\(fail_threshold=3, reset_timeout=10\)
for _ in range\(3\): cb.record_failure\(now=100\)
print\('breaker open:', cb.state.value, 'allow@105:', cb.allow\(now=105\), 'allow@111:', cb.allow\(now=111\)\)

# autoscaler reactive trend \(needs 60s hold\)
class P:
    n=0
    def launch\(self,tier\):
        P.n+=1; return Instance\(f'new{P.n}',tier,'http://new',InstanceState.HEALTHY\)
    def terminate\(self,iid\): pass
for inst in pool.all\(\): inst.gpu_mem_util=0.9; inst.state=InstanceState.HEALTHY
pool.get\(a\).pending_tokens=0
asc=Autoscaler\(pool=pool, provider=P\(\)\)
print\('t0:',asc.reactive_tick\(now=0.0\),'t61:',asc.reactive_tick\(now=61.0\)\)
print\('SERVING_OK'\)
")

Bash(cd /d/projects-python/rag && python -m py_compile src/rag/evaluation/*.py && echo "COMPILE_OK" && PYTHONPATH=src python -c "
from rag.evaluation.types import IntentSample, RetrievalSample
from rag.evaluation.intent_eval import evaluate_intent
from rag.evaluation.retrieval_eval import evaluate_retrieval
from rag.evaluation.symmetry import check_symmetry
from rag.evaluation.kg_eval import evaluate_kg, KGAnnotation
from rag.evaluation.release_gate import evaluate_gate
from rag.evaluation.business_monitor import BusinessMonitor
from rag.evaluation.types import EvalReport

# 8.1 intent eval: perfect predictor -> pass
samples=[IntentSample\('a','Intent-1'\),IntentSample\('b','Intent-2'\),IntentSample\('c','Intent-3'\)]*10
r=evaluate_intent\(samples, lambda q: {'a':'Intent-1','b':'Intent-2','c':'Intent-3'}[q]\)
print\('intent acc:', r.metrics['accuracy'], 'passed:', r.passed\)

# 8.2 retrieval eval: gt at rank1 -> MRR/recall high
rs=[RetrievalSample\('q1','Intent-1',['d1']\), RetrievalSample\('q2','Intent-1',['d2']\)]
rr=evaluate_retrieval\(rs, lambda q,i: {'q1':['d1','x'],'q2':['d2','y']}[q], k=5\)
print\('retrieval I1:', {k:round\(v,3\) for k,v in rr.per_intent['Intent-1'].items\(\)}, 'passed:', rr.passed\)

# 8.5 symmetry: asymmetric answer
sym=check_symmetry\('产品A性能好成本低。产品B性能好。',['产品A','产品B']\)
print\('symmetric:', sym.symmetric, 'missing:', {k:sorted\(v\) for k,v in sym.missing.items\(\)}\)

# 8.9 KG eval
ann=[KGAnnotation\('d1',{'A','B'},{\('A','依赖','B'\)}\)]
kg=evaluate_kg\(ann, {'d1':{'A','B'}}, {'d1':{\('A','依赖','B'\)}}\)
print\('kg entity_p:', kg.metrics['entity_precision'], 'passed:', kg.passed\)

# 8.8 gate: regression detection
rep=EvalReport\(name='intent', metrics={'accuracy':0.90}, passed=True\)
g=evaluate_gate\([rep], baseline={'intent.accuracy':0.95}, e2e_accuracy=0.88\)
print\('gate passed:', g.passed, 'regressions:', g.regressions\)

# 8.6/L4 business monitor
bm=BusinessMonitor\(\)
for i in range\(200\): bm.record\('total', now=100.0+i\)
for i in range\(20\): bm.record\('negative', now=100.0+i\)
print\('neg_rate:', round\(bm.rates\(now=250.0\)['negative_rate'],3\), 'alert:', bm.check_negative_alert\(now=250.0\)\)
print\('EVAL_OK'\)
")

Bash(cd /d/projects-python/rag && python -m py_compile src/rag/observability/*.py && echo "COMPILE_OK" && PYTHONPATH=src python -c "
from rag.observability.metrics import get_metrics
from rag.observability.tracing import get_tracer
from rag.observability.alerts import AlertManager
from rag.observability.pipeline_dashboard import PipelineDashboard, StageRun
m=get_metrics\(\); m.observe_request\('Intent-1',0.5\); m.observe_degradation\('L3'\); print\('metrics ok \(prom or noop\)'\)
t=get_tracer\(\)
with t.span\('intent', tenant='t1'\):
  with t.span\('retrieval', k=5\): pass
am=AlertManager\(\)
# P99 high with 30s hold
print\('t0:', [a.name for a in am.evaluate\({'p99_latency_s':4.0}, now=0.0\)]\)
print\('t31:', [a.name for a in am.evaluate\({'p99_latency_s':4.0}, now=31.0\)]\)
print\('kg immediate:', [a.name for a in am.evaluate\({'kg_entity_precision':0.5}, now=0.0\)]\)
d=PipelineDashboard\(\)
d.record\(StageRun\('embedding',12.0,True\)\); d.record\(StageRun\('embedding',8.0,False,'gpu_oom'\)\)
print\('dashboard:', d.snapshot\(\)['embedding']\)
print\('OBS_OK'\)
")
